STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_GNAW_BITE.title: Gnaw
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_HOLLOW_DEBT.title: Hollow Debt
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_HOLLOW_DEBT.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Heal HP equal to unblocked damage dealt.
Add 2 [gold]Toxic[/gold] cards with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] each to your [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_MALICE_SPREAD.title: Malice Spread
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_MALICE_SPREAD.descri: Apply X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} [gold]Weak[/gold] and X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_VEILED_FORM.title: Veiled Form
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_VEILED_FORM.descript:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all other cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Take an additional turn. Draw [blue]1[/blue] fewer card each turn.{IfUpgraded:show:
Next turn, draw 2 cards.|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_PLAGUE_RESONANCE.des: Discard {DiscardCards:diff()} cards. Lose {DexLoss:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn. Gain {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}. Apply {ArtifactStacks:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold] to a random enemy.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_SERPENT_ARRAY.title: Serpent Array
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_SERPENT_ARRAY.descri: Apply {PoisonStacks:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} times.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_PRACTICE_PERFECT.des: For this combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] ALL your [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] cards.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_BLOSSOM_BLADES.title: Blossom of Blades
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_BLOSSOM_BLADES.descr: For this combat, your [gold]Sovereign Blades[/gold] deal [blue]6[/blue] damage per hit. Hits [blue]1[/blue] + [blue]1[/blue] for every [blue]10[/blue] damage on the blade (before this effect). [gold]Forge[/gold] no longer increases their damage; every [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Forged[/gold] grants [blue]1[/blue] additional hit instead.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_FORGE_CHORUS.title: Forge Chorus
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_REQUIEM_CARD.title: Requiem
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_REQUIEM_CARD.descrip: Gain {RequiemGain:energyIcons()}. Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, gain {RequiemGain:energyIcons()}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_DREAM_RETURN.title: Dream Return
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_DREAM_RETURN.descrip: [gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()}. Put every [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They cost 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_UNDERWORLD_DRAW.desc: Choose X cards from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] and add them into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_WINTER_SLAM.title: Winter Slam
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_WINTER_SLAM.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each [gold]Frost Orb[/gold] you have [gold]Channeled[/gold] this combat, hit an additional time.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_LEARNING_JOY.title: Among Three, a Teacher
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_LEARNING_JOY.descrip: Choose 1 of 3 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded [/gold]|}Powers from other characters to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_BOOT_SEQUENCE.title: Quiet, Still Booting
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_BOOT_SEQUENCE.descri:
Gain {IfUpgraded:show:5|3}X [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose up to X cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They gain [gold]Retain[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].)|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_POST_COMBAT_TREATMEN: At the end of combat, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_MANIPULATION_REALITY: For this combat, cards you add during combat are [gold]Upgraded[/gold] if possible.
Gain [gold]Serpent Entropy[/gold]. When played, randomize costs for cards currently in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. For this combat, cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and all cards you draw have Energy cost randomized from [blue]0[/blue]–[blue]3[/blue]. Cards with a [gold]Star[/gold] cost have Star cost randomized from [blue]0[/blue]–[blue]4[/blue].{IfUpgraded:show:
Draw 3 cards.|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_HEAVEN_GIFT_CARD.des:
Lose 3 [gold]Gold[/gold]. At the end of combat, gain {IfUpgraded:show:7|5}X [gold]Gold[/gold].{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedGold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] at end of combat.)|}
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_SNAKE_ELO_CARD.title: Snakebite ELO
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_SNAKE_ELO_CARD.descr:
[gold]Transform[/gold] all Attacks into [gold]Snakebite[/gold].
At the end of combat, gain an additional card reward.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_KING_DISLIKES_MATH_C: When you lack either enough {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} or enough [gold]Stars[/gold] to pay for a card, pay the rest with the other: [blue]1[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} covers [blue]2[/blue]{singleStarIcon}; [blue]2[/blue]{singleStarIcon} cover [blue]1[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_REN_SWORD_CARD.title: Sword of Benevolence
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_REN_SWORD_CARD.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. All [gold]Swords of Righteousness[/gold] deal [blue]3[/blue] more damage this combat. Add a [gold]Sword of Righteousness[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from anywhere.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_YI_SWORD_CARD.title: Sword of Righteousness
STS2_AI_A_CARD_CARD_YI_SWORD_CARD.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. All [gold]Swords of Benevolence[/gold] deal [blue]3[/blue] more damage this combat. Add a [gold]Sword of Benevolence[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from anywhere.
